title: Re-entry Systems
shortSummary: Surviving the return — hypersonic aerodynamics, thermal protection, deceleration systems, and the engineering of controlled descent through an atmosphere.
whyItMatters: Re-entry is one of the most violent environments any engineered system faces. Temperatures exceed 1,600 degrees Celsius, deceleration loads reach multiple g-forces, and communications black out. SpaceX's Starship heat shield and Dragon's PICA-X are marvels of re-entry engineering.
